text.title: Semantic Tokens and Modes Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real token-system migrations. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Component CSS contains `var(--color-blue-500)` or raw hex `#0066cc`; dark-mode swap leaves buttons blue on dark surface.

root-cause.source: Internal — observed in component refactor PRs

antipattern.root-cause: Author skipped the system layer and pulled directly from reference, defeating the abstraction.
antipattern.fix: Enable `reject_raw_hex_in_components` + `reject_direct_reference_in_components` lint rules; require redirect to semantic alias such as `var(--color-action-primary)`.

antipattern.symptom: Adding brand-b doubled token count; every brand-a token is mirrored with a brand-b copy that differs only in two values.
antipattern.root-cause: Author duplicated the full token tree instead of overlaying only the delta values per mode.
antipattern.fix: Use mode overlays: each semantic token has one definition with `values_by_mode` keyed by mode name. Reject PRs that introduce parallel token namespaces per brand.

antipattern.symptom: Style Dictionary build emits iOS Swift tokens with pixel values; physical device renders text 2× too large.
antipattern.root-cause: Config omitted `size/pxToPt` (iOS) or `size/pxToSp` (Android) transforms; agent generated config from web template without platform translation.
antipattern.fix: Pipeline config MUST declare per-platform transformGroups (`web` / `ios` / `android`) and visual-regression MUST run on each target.

antipattern.symptom: Production dark-mode shows white text on white surface; CI never caught the gap.

root-cause.source: Figma Variables docs — missing mode value falls back to default

antipattern.root-cause: A semantic token shipped without a value in one mode; build did not enforce mode coverage.
antipattern.fix: Run `templates/check-modes.mjs` in CI; fail the build when any semantic token is missing a value in any required mode. Snapshot every mode in visual regression.
